title: Tropicraft [Unoffical]
description: A updated version of tropicraft for forge and fabric
body:
[Important Info: Most of the information below is taken from the original mods curseforge page to give credit and explain a bit about the mod as this is just a updated version of the mod for both Forge and Fabric]
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Are Vanilla beaches not doing it for you? Are the long hours of mining wearing you down?
Well get ready for the Minecraft vacation of a lifetime!
Introducing...

 

Tropicraft original dates back to 2011, being one of the longest-running mods of the game, and is one of the original dimension-adding mods for Minecraft now ported to the fabric mod Loader!
Inspired by a vacation to the lush tropical island of Puerto Rico, the mod's creator, Cojo, and his team, have created an idyllic, charming paradise in which to dream, explore, and let your creativity run free. With native islanders, volcanoes, and a plethora of tropical fauna and flora, the tropics contain everything necessary for an imaginative and restful escape from the doldrums of Vanilla.

Getting to the Tropics

1. Craft a beach chair (available in all 16 wool colors)

2.Craft a Piña Colada (All combinations of pineapples, coconuts, and chunks can create this)

3. Sip your drink in your beach chair at sunset

4. Find out what happens next for yourself!

If you wish you include Tropicraft in your modpack or on your server, by all means, feel free! All we ask is that you let us know when doing so if it is a public modpack or server so that we can spread the word and that you give us credit where it is due! Enjoy :)

Questions / Concerns?

If you have a bug report, find me on my Discord

Credit And Forge Links

If you just want to talk to the original mod developers or chat with other people who enjoy the mod, join their Discord!
The offical Repo can be found at their Github or at their Curseforge.
